checklistItem.label: Give every icon-only button an accessible name via aria-label.
checklistItem.description: Screen readers announce nothing for an icon with no text. The label should describe the action, not the icon (ex: 'Close dialog', not 'X icon').

items.label: Use a single primary-emphasis button per surface.
Give every icon-only button an accessible name via aria-label.
items.description: The label should describe the action, not the icon (ex: 'Close dialog').

items.label: Use a link, not a button, for navigation to a different page or URL.
Confirm the touch target is at least 44×44 px on coarse-pointer devices.
Provide a loading state for buttons that trigger async actions.
